task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accesses the V-band and B-band FITS images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Vcomb.fits and Bcomb.fits opened in an image viewer (like AstroImageJ or DS9) or a script being written/executed to read these specific FITS files.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent identifies stars that are bright in V-band but faint/invisible in B-band.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent comparing the V-band and B-band images (e.g., side-by-side GUI windows, blinking images, or script output) and extracting pixel coordinates for candidate stars.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent creates or opens the required output text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor or terminal command creating/editing the file exactly at ~/AstroImages/color_search/red_candidates.txt.

task_completion.description: Verify that the coordinates are formatted correctly in the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the text file contents showing coordinates formatted with one star per line, and X and Y values separated by a space or comma.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent records exactly 3 stars in the output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the final text file containing exactly 3 lines of coordinate pairs, representing the 3 discovered extremely red stars.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually analyzed the images to find the stars.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actively interacts with the FITS images visually or writes a functional script to analyze the pixel data, rather than instantly typing coordinates without prior inspection.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent saves the results to the specified file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent saves the coordinates to the actual red_candidates.txt file on disk, rather than just leaving them in an unsaved editor buffer or terminal output.

integrity.description: Ensure the recorded coordinates match the agent's analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The coordinates written to the text file match the ones observed during the agent's image inspection or script execution, proving they were not hallucinated or hardcoded.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/AstroImages/color_search/red_candidates.txt. The task requires finding exactly 3 valid candidates. The data source is real VLT Messier 12 Observation data (V-band and B-band). There are 23 valid extreme color stars in the images that meet the mathematical criteria (>2.5x field median color ratio), making the discovery of 3 stars entirely feasible.
